text: I feel curious and engaged here. The first scene with a glass-walled meeting room buzzes with activity and collaboration, making me contemplate the spirit of collective inquiry. The second image, with its vibrant colors and focus on R+D (Research and Development), inspires me—here, the boundaries of human creativity and technology are being pushed, and I feel both a sense of wonder and an urge to understand deeper connections between innovation and society. These spaces invite reflective participation in the shaping of the future.
